# CIS Kubernetes Benchmark v1.11.1 - Skills

This directory contains **134 SKILL.md files** for the CIS Kubernetes Benchmark v1.11.1.

## Overview

- **Benchmark Version**: 1.11.1
- **Total Controls**: 134
- **Profile Levels**: Level 1 and Level 2 (Master Node / Worker Node)
- **Platform**: Vanilla/Generic Kubernetes (cloud-agnostic)
